description_long: This house features a modern, cubic architectural design with clean white facades and large glass surfaces. The structure is composed of two main stories, with a flat roof and multiple terraces, some of which are covered with pergolas. The front area includes a landscaped garden with palm trees and a rectangular pool, while the rear showcases a spacious patio and a partially enclosed courtyard. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some large floor-to-ceiling panes and others smaller and more traditional. The main entryway is accentuated by a covered porch, steps, and minimalist columns, providing a welcoming yet contemporary appearance. The overall layout suggests a luxurious urban residence with ample outdoor living spaces and modern amenities.
description: A modern, two-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, landscaped gardens, and a pool, featuring clean lines and open terraces. The design emphasizes outdoor living and contemporary architectural elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, landscaped garden, and a glimpse of the pool area with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the covered patio, open courtyard, and the arrangement of windows and terraces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, multiple terraces, and the back garden area with additional greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, palm trees, and the extended glass-covered patio area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and some smaller panes
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, steps, minimalist columns, and a modern door
